Bus Timings

Bus 121 Schedule Hidd Al Saadiyat to Mazyad Mall (MBZ City)

November 15, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system is known for its efficiency, and Reg Bus 121 is a prime example of how seamlessly the city connects different neighborhoods. This route offers a convenient and affordable option for both residents and visitors traveling between the picturesque Saadiyat Island and the bustling commercial hub of MBZ City. Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting one of the city’s many attractions, or running errands, Reg Bus 121 makes navigating Abu Dhabi straightforward and enjoyable.

Operational Details

Here is the full schedule:

From Hidd Al Saadiyat From Mazyad Mall (MBZ City)
06:41 07:10
08:25 07:57
08:43 09:10
10:25 09:59
10:41 11:10
12:25 11:57
12:39 13:10
14:25 13:55
14:36 15:10
16:25 15:52
16:35 17:10
18:25 17:51
18:36 19:10
20:25 19:52
20:42 21:10
22:25 21:58
22:47 23:10
00:25 00:03

Download PDF Bus 121

Bus 121 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or follow this link for 121 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The fare structure for Reg Bus 121 is simple and cost-effective, making it accessible for all passengers:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer.

  • Payment Methods: Tickets can be purchased or topped up using the Hafilat Smart Card, which is available at various locations across the city. You can easily top up your card online or at kiosks, ensuring a hassle-free experience.

Route Overview

Reg Bus 121 starts its journey at Hidd Al Saadiyat on Al Dhiba Street and terminates at Mazyad Mall in MBZ City.

Here are the key stops along the route: 1.

  1. Saadiyat Beach Jumeirah Hotel A five-star hotel with world-class amenities.

  2. Saadiyat Beach Club A popular spot for relaxation and leisure by the sea.

  3. Saadiyat Beach Villas Central A peaceful residential community.

  4. Saadiyat Beach Residences A well-known residential complex offering modern living.

6.

  1. Jacques Chirac Street A major thoroughfare through Saadiyat Island.

  2. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque A notable mosque providing a quiet space for prayer.

  3. Emirates Tower An important office building in the heart of Abu Dhabi.

  4. Fatimah Bint Mubarak Street A busy street with various business and residential access points.

11.

  1. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A tranquil mosque situated near key city areas.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Abu Dhabi Bus Station The city’s central transit hub, connecting passengers to numerous bus routes.

  2. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A key road connecting major parts of the city.

  3. Al Jazeera Sports Club A hub for sports enthusiasts and events.

  4. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A major transfer point for other bus routes, making it easy to navigate Abu Dhabi.

  5. Capital Mall A modern shopping destination offering a variety of retail stores and dining options.

  6. Mazyad Mall The final stop, a popular shopping and entertainment center in MBZ City.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 121 is designed to accommodate all passengers, ensuring an inclusive travel experience. The buses are equipped with ramps and designated seating for differently-abled passengers, ensuring ease of access for everyone. Additionally, audio and visual aids are available to assist those with hearing or vision impairments, making the journey comfortable for all.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

One of the major advantages of Reg Bus 121 is its connectivity to other routes. These transfer points make it easy to continue your journey to other neighborhoods, shopping areas, or business districts.

Nearby Attractions

Reg Bus 121 provides convenient access to several notable landmarks and attractions in Abu Dhabi. Whether you’re heading to the beach, visiting cultural sites, or enjoying some shopping, this route has it all:

  • Hidd Al Saadiyat

  • Saadiyat Beach Jumeirah Hotel
  • Gold Center
  • Mazyad Mall

Journey Experience

A journey on Bus 121 from Hidd Al Saadiyat to Mazyad Mall (MBZ City) offers a scenic and extensive exploration of Abu Dhabi.

Along the way, passengers can enjoy the blend of Abu Dhabi’s serene landscapes and vibrant urban districts, making it a unique and informative experience.

Travel Tips

  • Travel during off-peak hours: This will help you avoid crowds, especially at popular stops like Mazyad Mall or Abu Dhabi Bus Station.

  • Use the Department of Transport App: Download the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app for real-time updates on bus schedules and any potential delays.
  • Carry a portable phone charger: Keep your devices powered during the trip, especially if you rely on your phone for navigation or communication.
  • Plan ahead: Check the bus timings in advance to ensure smooth travel between appointments or activities.

Whether you’re commuting to work, running errands, or heading out for leisure, this route ensures that you can navigate the city with ease.

With its frequent timings, well-placed stops, and seamless connectivity to other routes, Reg Bus 121 provides an excellent travel solution for residents and visitors alike. So hop on board, and let Reg Bus 121 take you to your destination with ease! For a more comprehensive look at all available routes and services, don’t forget to explore the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes to plan your journey effectively.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 15, 2025.
